commands.summary: Confirmed exact public dependency repopact==2.2.0 is installed.

commands.command: python -m repopact_cli dashboard --root . && python -m repopact_cli validate --root .
commands.summary: Generated the canonical dashboard and passed RepoPact 2.2.0 governance validation.
Validated 3 certifications, 19 domains, 770 questions, 135 flashcards, 28 PBQs, and 150 lessons with complete objective coverage.
